evidence: Agentforce positioned as agentic CRM across Customer 360 applications.
workflow_interpretation: Not enough alone; concept is now productized.

evidence: Product releases and investor product webinar referenced; not the core evidence used.

evidence: Agentforce ARR disclosed at $1.2B, up 205% Y/Y.
workflow_interpretation: This is stronger than narrative-only AI software evidence.

evidence: 3.8B Agentic Work Units delivered to date and token processing up 152% Q/Q.

evidence: More than 50% of Agentforce and Data 360 bookings came from existing customers; premium SKU bookings grew nearly 60% Y/Y.
workflow_interpretation: Cross-sell and expansion signal exists but absolute size and retention are missing.
next_required_evidence: Net expansion rate for Agentforce/Data 360 cohorts.

evidence: No Agentforce-specific retention or churn metric disclosed.

evidence: Premium SKUs are referenced, but price realization is not separately disclosed.
workflow_interpretation: Packaging suggests potential pricing power; not proven.
next_required_evidence: ASP, attach rate, price uplift or gross retention.

evidence: Company maintained FY27 non-GAAP operating margin guidance of 34.3%, but Agentforce-specific margin contribution is not disclosed.
workflow_interpretation: Company margin is strong; product-level margin conversion remains unproven.
